title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - VMware India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
